$comment: Layer B selection cases for RETAIL vs the real GnuCOBOL harness image. The double rounding (discount settled to whole dollars, tax on the settled amount) means a candidate that taxes the unrounded discounted value diverges by whole cents whenever the dollar settle moves the base: 10.56 -> 9.504 settles to 10, tax 0.83 vs 0.78. Cases cover both nested roundings, the 500.00 tier boundary from both sides, a tiny settle-up, and zero.

legacy.label: COBOL 85 RETAIL (GnuCOBOL via harness image legacymind/legacy-retail)
